title: ExplainBench: A Benchmark Framework for Local Model Explanations in Fairness-Critical Applications
description: ExplainBench is a reproducible benchmark framework for evaluating attribution and counterfactual explanations in fairness-critical tabular classification settings. The current reproducible artifact includes a COMPAS benchmark with attribution explainers, DiCE counterfactual explanations, multi-seed summaries, paper-ready tables, paper-ready figures, documentation, and automated tests.
